title: elatostema sessile var. punctatum
intro: Elatostema sessile var. punctatum, also known as punctate creeping joyweed, is a variety of the Elatostema sessile plant, a type of flowering plant in the nettle family (Urticaceae). Native to China and Southeast Asia, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Elatostema sessile var. punctatum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antidote for snake venom. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
